code.title: if sender requests acknowledgement, i.e. UNB and UNZ segments received and identified
if the interchange is a test. Otherwise not used
Creation, must be present for first transfer if more than one foreseen
Final, must be present for last transfer

data_element.name: SectionIdentification
data_element.desc: Separates sections in a message by one of the following codes

code.title: separates the header and detail sections
separates the detail and summary sections
